vector identifiers

variable types (INT_VALUE/REAL_VALUE)

maximum value for each variable
minimum interval between 2 values for each variable

marginal histograms
mean vector
variance-covariance matrix

briefdescription.para: Partitioning of values of a real-valued variable.

parameterdescription.para: real limits between classes (beginning of classes).

briefdescription.para: Selection of variables.
Removing of the 1st variable (supposed to be a state variable).
Selection of 2 variables supposed to be an explanatory variable and a response variable.
Writing of vectors.

parameterdescription.para: posterior probabilities of the optimal assignments.

briefdescription.para: Writing of vectors at the Gnuplot format.
Writing of 2-dimensional vectors for plotting.
Writing of frequencies associated with 2-dimensional vectors.
Computation of the minimum value taken by a variable.
Computation of the maximum taken by a variable.

Construction of the marginal histogram for a variable.
Computation of an order on the individuals on the basis of the values taken by a variable.

Variance computation for a variable.

Computation of the correlation matrix from the variance-covariance matrix.
Computation of the Spearman rank correlation coefficient matrix.
Computation of the Kendall rank correlation coefficient matrix.
